name: superai-consultant-research
description: Research and summarize industry news, company backgrounds, and competitive intelligence for client prep. Designed for management consultants.

brave_api_key.title: Brave Search API Key (optional)
brave_api_key.description: Free API key from https://brave.com/search/api/ — enables real-time web search. Leave blank to use built-in research templates only.

tools.name: research_company
tools.description: Research a company: recent news, financial overview, key leadership, strategic priorities, and competitive positioning.

tools.name: prepare_client_brief
tools.description: Generate a structured pre-meeting client brief: agenda preparation, talking points, risk areas, and opportunity angles.

tools.name: analyze_industry_trends
tools.description: Summarize recent trends in an industry sector for client positioning and strategic advice.

tools.name: competitive_snapshot
tools.description: Build a quick competitive snapshot: key players, market share estimates, recent moves, and differentiation factors.
